name: fullstack-project
description: Fullstack project with frontend and backend

scripts.install: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev: echo "Choose your OS: npm run dev:windows (Windows) or npm run dev:unix (Mac/Linux) or open 2 terminals and run: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:windows: start "Frontend" cmd /c "npm run dev:frontend" && start "Backend" cmd /c "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:unix: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: echo "Choose your OS: npm run start:windows (Windows) or npm run start:unix (Mac/Linux) or open 2 terminals and run: npm run start:frontend & npm run start:backend"
scripts.start:windows: start "Frontend" cmd /c "npm run start:frontend" && start "Backend" cmd /c "npm run start:backend"
scripts.start:unix: npm run start:frontend & npm run start:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
